title: Friendly Creepers
description: Creepers just want to hug you. Without exploding.
body:
# **Friendly Creepers**

*Friendly Creepers* makes Minecraft a little less explosive.

### Features:
- **No Explosions:** Creepers no longer blow up, so your builds stay safe.  
- **Close, but Harmless:** Creepers still walk up to players, but they won’t cause any damage.
